api_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
api_error_permission_denied: You don't have permission to do that.
pending_jobs_error: Could not load background job status.
settings_description: Manage your account and inbox automation.
settings_auto_labels_description: View and manage labels applied automatically to your messages.
settings_auto_labels_empty: No labels yet. Add one to get started.
settings_auto_labels_wizard_step_example: Optional: up to five example threads from your inbox.
settings_auto_labels_wizard_step_invalid: Enter a label name before continuing.
settings_auto_labels_examples_descriptio: Pick up to five recent threads whose latest message should count as a positive example for this label. This is optional but helps the model match your intent.
settings_auto_labels_examples_empty: No threads yet. Sync your inbox from the Inbox page, then try again.
settings_auto_labels_thread_no_message: No message available for this thread
home_threads_empty_description: Your inbox has no threads to show yet. Try syncing from the app or check back after new mail arrives.
home_threads_empty_setup_description: We're syncing your inbox. Threads will appear here shortly.
home_threads_sync_disabled_aria: Sync unavailable while background jobs are running
features_auth_sign_in_error_oauth_state: The sign-in session expired or was invalid. Please try again.
features_auth_sign_in_error_provider: Google could not complete sign-in. Please try again.
features_auth_sign_in_error_inbox: Your inbox is not connected. Connect Gmail and try again.
features_auth_sign_in_error_sync: We could not sync your inbox yet. You can retry from the app.
features_auth_sign_in_error_server: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again.
features_auth_sign_in_subtitle: To continue, sign in to your account.
